headline: Nvidia (NVDA) Teams With Palantir To Bring Sovereign AI To Government
summary: NVIDIA and Palantir announced a new initiative to deliver secure, sovereign AI infrastructure for U.S. government and critical industries. The collaboration centers on open-source Nemotron models and Palantir AIP, designed for classified and highly regulated environments. The offering focuses on strict data control, mission-specific model optimization, and full traceability of AI workflows. NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) is extending its AI platform into sensitive public sector and infrastructure...
